zone_name: The Dark Forest - Brown River Valley

3314.name: The Edge of Night
3314.description: Huge trunks soar gracefully upward, then spread their branches and close out the sky. You stand in utter blackness amidst the pale but flourishing undergrowth. Insects abound, thickening the air in cloud-like swarms. Above all, there is silence. Not a sound reaches your ears through the moist air, that you at times forget you are moving. North and south, the forest thins. West of here lies the heart of the dark woods.

3316.name: Edge of the Forest
3316.description: The forest seems to be expanding slowly over the grasslands, sending out saplings like those which now surround you to scout the borders. The wide spacing makes for easy travel between the trees, and the undergrowth consists primarily of the grasses that cover the slopes to the east. A stand of ash is visible to the south, and a path leads into the denser trees to the west. To the east, the trees end.

e.to_room_name: Northern Slopes of the River Valley

2201.name: River through the Dark Forest
2201.description: You've reached the edge of the forest, and feel relief as the sky opens overhead again to the west. The river flows slowly here from east to west, leaving the dark woods behind, but carrying with it the billowing brown detritus that gives it a new name: the Brown River. You have not quite left

s.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

2202.name: The Dark Forest
2202.description: You stand inside the western edge of the dark forest. The trees here are wider and more squat than those to the east, but just as effectively block all traces of light from the sky overhead. You can head north through the forest, enter the river to the south, or return to the grassy slopes just to the west.

n.to_zone: The Dark Forest - Brown River Valley

2203.name: The Dark Forest
2203.description: The squat trees grow in nearly geometric patterns here, bringing to mind the dark intelligence of the gods. Oddly colored brush scratches you and the low branches catch at you as you wander through the dark, silent woods. The trees continue to the east and south, and to the north a hill rises to a grassy slope.

n.to_room_name: Northern Slopes of the River Valley
